title: UnderlyingCauseOfDeath

stemCode.description: Stem code for the computed underlying cause of death

stemURI.description: URI for the stem code of the computed underlying cause of death

code.description: Code for underlying cause of death. May include postcoordination combinations

uri.description: URI for underlying cause of death. May include postcoordination combinations

report.description: Output report prepared during the computation of the underlying cause of death

tabularReport.description: Detailed tabular output report prepared during the computation of the underlying cause of death

reject.description: Whether the underlying cause of death was rejected due to an error

error.description: Any errors returned by the doris engine

warning.description: Any warnings returned by the doris engine

description: Underlying cause of death response from DORIS system
